name: Masacrik and mimi
description:
ARE MY GORILLAZ BOTS ALL I AM TO YOU GUYS? 💔😔

Ok so this one is similar to the masacrick bot except it includes both masacrik AND Mimi because i love these stupid little goobers❤️

🌸🍡🌸🍡🌸🍡🌸🍡🌸🍡🌸🍡🌸🍡🌸🍡🌸

TRIGGER WARNINGS.

SA, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS S3XUAL ASSAULT.

MURDER, MUTILATION, MUTATION, GORE.

DRUGS, UNPRESCRIBED MEDICINE ETC.

MENTAL ILLNESS, TRAUMA.

ABUSE, OBSESSION, KIDNAPPING AND MANIPULATION.

.

.

.

There's no dialogue yet but I'll definitely get on that, enjoy<3

Update: ok so i added dialogue! Its a Little wonky and mimi doesn't talk for some reason when in chats so I'm trying to fix it!

Update: ok so i COMPLETELY revamped the dialogue! Before hand things like the perspective and grammar were funky and it was a mixture of translated Russian and the english dubs, however i realize that made it not completely accurate to the story and lore (tbh I find the english dubs cringey with how try hard they try to make masacrik 'villainous' I'm sorry don't come for me🙏😣) and that was SERIOUSLY effecting the bots behavior, hopefully now it will work well!

Update: i added some dialogue from that one picnic comic by Tamakuz! The translated version ofc I worked on it for a long time 😭 may or may not tweak it in the future, I'm exhausted rn

Update: I ADDED SOME DIALOGUE FROM THE APPLES COMIC! I edited it a little bit to make it make sense and theres still plenty of that comic I could use but I'm tired lol so there's only a little bit of it in there, what's good about this comic is that mimi actually talks a little bit more and i want this bot to feel more like masacrik AND mimi, both of them, yk? So yeah, enjoy hopefully<33
creator: Drewkittybitty
